principles: Generous Whitespace: Use 3x standard padding to create a feeling of luxury.
Typography as Image: Headings should be treated as graphic elements.
Soft Contrast: Avoid harsh blacks. Use warm charcoals and deep browns.
Tactile Textures: Use subtle grain or paper textures to soften the digital feel.
Golden Touch: Use gold/bronze accents sparingly for 'Premium' cues.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headlines, and major calls to action.

body.usage: Paragraphs, navigation, buttons, and form labels.

primary.name: Salmon Coral
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Highlights, Discount Badges (Use sparingly)

grids.services: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) - Mix of large and small cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#f59d79] text-white hover:bg-[#e08c68] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: border border-[#f59d79] text-[#f59d79] hover:bg-[#f59d79] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-[#2D2A26] hover:text-[#f59d79] font-medium tracking-wide border-b border-transparent hover:border-[#f59d79] transition-all

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] transition-all duration-300 border border-[#f59d79]/10 group cursor-pointer
cards.testimonial_card: bg-[#FFFDF9] p-10 rounded-xl border border-[#D4AF37]/20 relative

forms.input: bg-white/50 border-b border-[#2D2A26]/20 focus:border-[#f59d79] focus:outline-none px-0 py-4 w-full transition-colors placeholder:text-[#2D2A26]/40
forms.library: Use Shadcn UI for DatePickers, Select, and Dialogs. Customize styling to match 'input' style above.

home.hero: Split screen. Left: Emotional Headline + Booking CTA. Right: Immersive Video/Image.

services.layout: Detailed page with 'Process', 'Benefits', 'Pricing Table', and 'FAQ' accordion.

booking.layout: Clean, distraction-free. Multi-step form using Shadcn Tabs or Stepper.

seo_requirements.nap: L'atelier Secret, 2475 Saint-Georges Street, LeMoyne, QC J4R 2T4 | +1 438 882 2165
seo_requirements.schema: LocalBusiness schema must be present on Home and Contact pages.
seo_requirements.footer: Must include full NAP and Google Maps embed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (H1-H6). Import from Google Fonts.
Use 'Lato' for Body text. Import from Google Fonts.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps pages with the Navbar and Luxury Footer.
For the 'Booking' page, use a multi-step form wizard style.
Ensure the 'Réserver maintenant' (Book Now) button is always visible (Sticky Header).
Preserve all existing URLs (e.g., /laser-hair, /microneedling) using React Router.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like`🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
